summary: Frontend testing completed for VMS360 Advanced Analytics page. All 6 tabs, period selector, refresh button, and sidebar navigation working correctly.
passed_tests: Advanced Analytics page loads correctly at /advanced-analytics - PASSED
Tab 1: Genel Bakış (Overview) - Shows stat cards (visitors, occupancy, wait time, stores), hourly traffic chart, weekly trend chart, peak alerts - PASSED
Tab 2: Trafik Analizi (Traffic Analysis) - Shows hourly detailed traffic chart, period comparison, daily trend chart - PASSED
Tab 3: Demografi (Demographics) - Shows gender pie chart (Erkek/Kadın), target audience analysis, hourly demographic breakdown - PASSED
Tab 4: Mağaza Performansı (Store Performance) - Shows store ranking, capacity utilization chart, region analysis - PASSED
Tab 5: Tahmin & Uyarılar (Forecast & Alerts) - Shows 7-day visitor forecast, recommendations, peak hour predictions - PASSED
Tab 6: Kuyruk Analizi (Queue Analysis) - Shows checkout analytics per store with queue lengths and wait times - PASSED
Period selector (Haftalık/Aylık/Çeyreklik) changes data correctly - PASSED
Sidebar navigation includes 'Gelişmiş Analitik' menu item with Activity icon - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Analytics data is generated using sample data when no real VMS data is available (MOCKED for demo purposes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced Analytics page fully tested with all 6 tabs: Genel Bakış, Trafik Analizi, Demografi, Mağaza Performansı, Tahmin & Uyarılar, Kuyruk Analizi. Period selector (Haftalık/Aylık/Çeyreklik) and Refresh button working. Backend uses sample data generation for demo when no real VMS data available.
mocked_api_note: MOCKED: Backend analytics endpoints return generated sample data for demo purposes when no real VMS data is available
